description:
Palgova is one of the oldest and most cherished traditional sweets of South India.
Its history dates back centuries, when it was prepared in temple kitchens and village households using fresh milk and slow fire.Over generations, the method of making Palgova remained unchanged, preserving its authenticity. Even today, traditional Palgova follows the same slow-cooking process, making it a timeless sweet that represents heritage, devotion, and craftsmanship.
title: About Palgova
